narrative:
Clinton Township has 12,679 registered voters, with 62.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.8 percentage points.
